# Python
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python
*.egg
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/
.eggs/

# Virtual environments
isosci_env/
venv/
env/
.venv/

# API keys and secrets
.env
.env.*
secrets.json
*_key.txt

# Raw seeds — sourced from public benchmarks, not redistributed
data/raw/

# Individual eval files — large and regenerable by running stage 4
data/results/eval_*.json
data/results/*_partial.json
data/results_243/

# Keep only the merged results file
!data/results/all_results.json

# Analysis outputs (regenerated by pipeline)
analysis/
outputs/figure_*.pdf
outputs/figure_*.png
outputs/table_*.tex
outputs/qualitative_examples.tex

# HuggingFace upload staging
outputs/hf_upload/

# Annotation working files
annotation/
annotation_v2/
annotation_output/

# Logs
logs/
*.log

# OS
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# IDE
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo

# Jupyter
.ipynb_checkpoints/
*.ipynb

# LaTeX build artifacts
*.aux
*.bbl
*.blg
*.fdb_latexmk
*.fls
*.log
*.out

*.pdf

# Keep these tracked
!data/verified/verified_pairs_144.json
